# WeightLoss App — AI Metabolic Coach

> WeightLoss App is an AI-powered weight loss platform providing personalised metabolic coaching, calorie and macro targets, meal plan guidance, lab test interpretation, and progress tracking. All plans are generated by AI and tailored to individual goals, body type, and dietary preference.

## Platform

- [Home](https://weightloss.app/): AI metabolic coach — personalised weight loss plans, macro targets, and progress tracking
- [Weight Loss Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/): 180+ personalised diet and goal plan combinations across 12 goals and 14 diets
- [Community Results](https://weightloss.app/results/): Real user weight loss journeys with progress details, diet used, and timeframe
- [Blog](https://weightloss.app/blog/): Expert articles on nutrition, metabolism, calorie science, and sustainable fat loss

## Popular Weight Loss Plans

- [How to Lose Weight](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-weight): Calorie deficit approach with personalised macro targets
- [How to Lose Belly Fat](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-belly-fat): Visceral fat reduction via deficit eating and food prioritisation
- [Lose Weight on Keto](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-weight-keto): Ketogenic diet for fat adaptation and sustainable weight loss
- [Lose Weight on Mediterranean Diet](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-weight-mediterranean): Whole-food Mediterranean approach with olive oil, fish, and vegetables
- [Lose Weight with Intermittent Fasting](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-weight-intermittent-fasting): Time-restricted eating protocols (16:8, 18:6, OMAD)
- [High Protein Weight Loss Plan](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-weight-high-protein): Muscle-preserving approach with 1.6–2.2 g protein per kg body weight
- [Vegan Weight Loss Plan](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-weight-vegan): Plant-based calorie deficit with complete protein sources
- [Low Carb Weight Loss](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-weight-low-carb): Reduced carbohydrate intake for insulin management and fat loss
- [Get Lean on Keto](https://weightloss.app/plan/get-lean-keto): Ketogenic protocol for body recomposition and fat loss
- [Lose 10kg Plan](https://weightloss.app/plan/lose-10kg): Structured 10 kg weight loss plan with realistic timeframes

## Goal Hubs

- [Lose Weight Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/goal/lose-weight): All diet variations for the lose-weight goal
- [Lose Belly Fat Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/goal/lose-belly-fat): Diet variations targeting visceral fat
- [Get Lean Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/goal/get-lean): Recomposition-focused plan variations
- [Burn Fat Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/goal/burn-fat): Fat oxidation focused plans across diets

## Diet Hubs

- [Keto Diet Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/diet/keto): All goals achievable via ketogenic diet
- [Mediterranean Diet Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/diet/mediterranean): Weight loss goals on Mediterranean eating
- [Intermittent Fasting Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/diet/intermittent-fasting): All goals with time-restricted eating
- [High Protein Diet Plans](https://weightloss.app/plan/diet/high-protein): Muscle-first approach across all goals

## Optional

- [Full Site Sitemap](https://weightloss.app/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap covering all 180+ plan pages, blog posts, and profiles
- [LLMs Full Index](https://weightloss.app/llms-full.txt): Machine-readable text index of all pages with titles and descriptions
